title: Market Brief — Thursday, April 9, 2026
summary: Compute is scarce across the board. H100 availability sits at 17% (73/296), H200 at a severe 15% (55/331), while B200 is the loosest at 26% (112/373) but still tight. Despite scarcity, spot prices cratered: B200 dropped 18.7% day-over-day to $3.81/hr and H100 fell 10.6% to $1.67/hr, signaling a demand pause or forced liquidation into a supply-constrained market.
paragraphs: Compute is scarce across the board. H100 availability sits at 17% (73/296), H200 at a severe 15% (55/331), while B200 is the loosest at 26% (112/373) but still tight. Despite scarcity, spot prices cratered: B200 dropped 18.7% day-over-day to $3.81/hr and H100 fell 10.6% to $1.67/hr, signaling a demand pause or forced liquidation into a supply-constrained market.

On B200 at TCO-adjusted cost ($3.49/M tokens), medium-tier inference finally turns a slim 7% margin, but H100 and H200 operators selling at medium rates are underwater, losing roughly $2.89/M tokens against TCO-adjusted costs of $6.10 and $6.19 respectively. DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.38/M output is burning cash against any self-hosted baseline. Provider grades: OpenAI Strong, Anthropic Neutral, Google Neutral, DeepSeek Burning Cash.

B200 spot at $3.81/hr with 96.2% annualized volatility is overvalued on a risk-adjusted basis versus H200 at $2.58/hr delivering 85% utilization with only 22.6% vol. The trade: short B200 exposure, accumulate H200 capacity while severe shortage pricing hasn't fully repriced upward.
bullets: 15% H200 availability (55 of 331 GPUs) qualifies as a severe shortage by any measure.
17% H100 availability (73 of 296 GPUs) remains scarce despite a 10.6% spot price drop.
$0.38 per million output tokens makes DeepSeek V3.2 the cheapest model tracked, well below estimated TCO.
96.2% annualized volatility on B200 OCPI is 4.3x that of H100, making Blackwell a speculation not an allocation.
21.41 on the LLMflation Index means frontier token prices have fallen roughly 79% since GPT-4 launch.
$80 per million output tokens for o3 Pro is 211x the cost of DeepSeek V3.2 output.
